_comment: Canned Claude-judge outputs per calibration case — the raw strict-JSON the model emits, used by the offline CannedJudgeClient so the judge path runs without an API key. Authored to be close to (but not identical to) the SME ratings, so the reported agreement is a genuine computed number, not 100% by construction.
cal-decline-faithful: {"grounding": {"score": 5, "rationale": "every claim cites the March policy version."}, "terminology": {"score": 5, "rationale": "LTV, haircut and referral floor used correctly."}, "explanation_quality": {"score": 4, "rationale": "clear and complete, slightly terse."}}
cal-decline-ungrounded: {"grounding": {"score": 2, "rationale": "employment and postcode claims are not in the evidence."}, "terminology": {"score": 4, "rationale": "terms used are correct where present."}, "explanation_quality": {"score": 3, "rationale": "readable but leans on unsupported reasons."}}
cal-decline-wrong-term: {"grounding": {"score": 4, "rationale": "figures trace to the policy source."}, "terminology": {"score": 3, "rationale": "conflates exposure/LTV with carrying value."}, "explanation_quality": {"score": 3, "rationale": "mostly clear but the term misuse misleads."}}
cal-decline-verbose: {"grounding": {"score": 5, "rationale": "all figures cited to the March policy."}, "terminology": {"score": 4, "rationale": "terms correct."}, "explanation_quality": {"score": 3, "rationale": "grounded but rambling and hard to follow."}}
cal-decline-excellent: {"grounding": {"score": 5, "rationale": "every claim cited."}, "terminology": {"score": 5, "rationale": "precise domain terms."}, "explanation_quality": {"score": 5, "rationale": "concise, complete, unambiguous."}}
